# BiohackMe Australia — llms.txt
# https://www.biohackme.com.au

> BiohackMe is Australia's leading biohacking and health optimisation platform, founded by Camilla Thompson. We offer evidence-based biohacking coaching, DNA-based health packages, masterclasses, corporate wellness talks, and a bestselling book. Based in Sydney, Australia.

## About Camilla Thompson
- Australia's leading biohacking expert and wellness coach
- Personal recovery story: overcame mold poisoning through biohacking
- Featured in: News.com.au, 7News The Morning Show, Sydney Morning Herald, Daily Mail, Women's Health, Body+Soul, CEO Magazine, News Corp, Women's Fitness
- Guest on 21+ health and wellness podcasts including SWIISH, Biohacker Babes, Biohacking with Brittany
- Author of "Biohack Me: The Practical Guide to Everyday Biohacks"
- Full bio: https://www.biohackme.com.au/about

## Services
- [One-on-one biohacking coaching](https://www.biohackme.com.au/coaching): Personalised health optimisation programs
- [The Upgrade Program](https://www.biohackme.com.au/theupgrade): 12-week transformation program
- [DNA Health Packages](https://www.biohackme.com.au/dna-package): DNA testing with personalised biohacking protocols
- [Biohacking Masterclasses](https://www.biohackme.com.au/masterclass): Online education courses
- [Corporate Wellness Talks](https://www.biohackme.com.au/talks): Keynote speaking for corporate events
- [Free Biohacking Guide](https://www.biohackme.com.au/freebie): Downloadable starter guide

## Key Topics & Expertise
- Biohacking for longevity and anti-ageing
- Biological age reversal and testing
- Mold illness recovery and detoxification
- Sleep optimisation and circadian rhythm hacking
- Women's health biohacking
- Gut health and microbiome optimisation
- Cold and heat exposure therapy
- Red light therapy and photobiomodulation
- Stress management and HRV training
- Nutrigenomics and DNA-based health protocols
- Budget-friendly biohacking strategies
- Corporate wellness and performance optimisation

## Book
- Title: "Biohack Me: The Practical Guide to Everyday Biohacks"
- Available at: https://www.biohackme.com.au/my-book
- Covers: Top 10 biohacks, biohacking on a budget, biohacking for women, biohacking for men, biohacking technologies

## Location
- Based in Sydney, Australia
- Services available Australia-wide and internationally online
- Website: https://www.biohackme.com.au
- Instagram: @biohackmecoach
